business.name: Jenkins Rapid Repair and Cleaning llc
business.tagline: Fast fixes when you need them most

hero.headline: Charleston's *rapid response* plumbing team
hero.subheadline: Same-day service, fair pricing, and we actually show up when we say we will.

services_section.label: RAPID REPAIRS
services_section.heading: Every pipe, drain, and fixture
services_section.subheading: From emergency calls to planned upgrades

services.title: Emergency Plumbing
services.description: Water heater died? Pipe burst? We respond fast and fix it right the first time.

services.title: Water Heater Service
services.description: Tankless and traditional repairs, replacements, and maintenance to keep hot water flowing.

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: Find hidden leaks before they cause damage. Quick fixes that last.

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Clogged drains and slow pipes cleared with professional tools and techniques.

about.heading: Charleston plumbers who answer the phone
about.body: We're the team Charleston calls when plumbing problems can't wait. Fair pricing, same-day service, and we follow up to make sure everything's working right.

reviews.name: Lorrie C.
reviews.text: Very accommodating with scheduling and communicated well. Quickly resolved our plumbing issues. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Sam E.
reviews.text: Terrell fixed my hot water heater issue, found the right parts, and gave me manufacturer tips for optimal performance. He's good people and knows his stuff.

reviews.name: Michael K.
reviews.text: Replaced our exterior tankless water heater same-day in freezing weather. Fair pricing, pleasure to deal with, and followed up to ensure everything was perfect.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Charleston and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout the Lowcountry

cta.heading: Ready to fix your plumbing problem?
cta.body: Don't let a small issue become a big headache. Call Jenkins Rapid Repair for same-day service and upfront pricing.
